lecture_statement: BSM and the parity equality use a fixed expiry.
additive_precision: Use exact C - P = S - K*exp(-rT) for non-dividend European options; use American bounds or trees for early exercise.
trading_control: Check contract exercise style before applying parity or Black-Scholes directly.

additive_precision: Many listed single-stock options, especially in the US, are American-style; style is a contract specification.
trading_control: Read exchange specs for exercise, settlement, multiplier, expiry, and dividend treatment.

additive_precision: Observed markets have skew, term structure, and volatility clustering.
trading_control: Treat BSM as a mapping between price and implied volatility, then monitor vega/gamma/theta risk.

additive_precision: Dividends affect forwards and early-exercise incentives.
trading_control: Use dividend-adjusted or forward-based pricing when the underlying pays dividends.

lecture_statement: Greeks are partial derivatives around the current inputs.
additive_precision: Large spot/vol/time moves require revaluation, not only first-order Greek extrapolation.
trading_control: Stress the whole portfolio under spot-vol-time scenarios.
